{{Infobox technique
| name = Blood Shadows
| introduced = cradle-04-skysworn
}}

''See also: [[Blood Shadows Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Blood Shadows are spiritual parasites originating from the [[Dreadgod]] known as the [[Bleeding Phoenix]]. They function as hunger spirits whose primary purpose is to find hosts, drain their power, and return that [[essence]] to the [[Phoenix]]. While they often seek to possess or consume individuals, some practitioners establish symbiotic relationships with them through intense willpower. These entities are highly mutable and can be shaped into various forms depending on how they are fed. There are several distinct ways these Shadows manifest. A common, weaker method involves feeding them [[blood madra]] to create a formless [[Shadow]] that acts as a flexible weapon or tool. Another method involves feeding them actual blood to create bestial, monstrous forms that resemble [[sacred beasts]] or remnants. The most advanced and difficult form is a perfect copy of the host, acting as a loyal partner that shares the user's thoughts and abilities in combat. In addition to their role as companions or weapons, Blood Shadows can be used to create bloodspawn—mindless, shambling creatures that serve as attackers. While some users manage their Shadows as extensions of their own [[sacred arts]], the entities themselves are inherently predatory and will attempt to break free from their hosts to feed if not strictly restrained.}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Blood Shadows]] are used by [[Redmoon Hall]] vassals to take control.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c11">''Skysworn'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Blood Shadows]] are dispersed by the [[Bleeding Phoenix]] to gather power for new bodies.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c18">''Skysworn'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Blood Shadows]] are part of [[Redmoon Hall]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c22">''Underlord'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Sage of Red Faith]] encourages the spreading of [[Blood Shadows]] on the wild.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11">''Wintersteel'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Redmoon Overlords]] summoned [[Blood Shadows]] around their weapons.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Blood Shadows]] are entities that [[Little Blue]] can feed on.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c5">''Dreadgod'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Absorbing and purifying [[Blood Shadows]] helped [[Little Blue]]'s understanding of spirits.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c17">''Waybound'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Blood Shadows]] in the shape of birds screeched overhead.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c25">''Waybound'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
